page_content:
Repeatable to: 3 credits.

Credit Only Granted for: EDCI614 or EDCI619.

EDCI637 Internship in World Language/TESOL Education (2-6 Credits) Practical experience as a full-time intern with a fully licensed World Language/TESOL teacher in a diverse school setting; assigned professional responsibilities and participates in teaching/learning experiences.

Prerequisite: EDCI1434 and EDCI634; or permission of EDUC-Teaching, Learning, Policy and Leadership department.

Additional Information: Internship lab fee applies. See current program description for details.
